titleStmt.title: SII 8.371: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 371. (A.R. No. 90 of 1903). ON THE SAME ROCK.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ
parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷa tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamā
na mācaṁdrārkkatā is inserted below the line.tāraṁbaraṁ jayantipurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu svasti samastapraśasti
sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sāvāsigaḷadhiṣṭhāyaka kannaḍa sandhivigrahi sēnādhipati daṇḍanāyakaṁ bhōgabhaṭṭayyaṁgaḷu besesalu śrīmaccālu
kya vikramavarṣada 47-neya śubhakṛtsaṁvatsarada bhādrapada śuddha 14 sukravāradaṁdu śrīmadguttiya kōṭeya daThe letter da is inserted below the line.ṇḍanāyakavarasaruṁ Alli
pāḷeyada śrīmat rājādhyakṣaṁ sāvāsi karppūrabhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ Ānaṁdabhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ malli bhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ śrīmat rājā
dhyakṣada sēnabōva nākarasanuṁ [Āsvada] Alliya kāhina nāyakaruṁ [Annimā]narasanuṁ mallarasanuṁ Iṁtinibaru mirddu
śrī viṣṇudēvara raṁgabhōgada pātrapāvuḷakkaṁ guttiya kōṭeyiṁ paḍuvalu cimmanereyalu viṣṇubhaṭṭōpādhyāyargge
dhārāpūvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa mattaru 40 bammaṭeyana keṟe 1 = ©
bhaṭṭargge brahmapurigeyāgi koṭṭa mattaru 5 © sarvvānētāṁ bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . savvānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbiḥ [.]
svadattāṁ paradattāṁvā yōharēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 8.371 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
